facts.explanation: 了 (le) — (completed action marker). Also: (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now), (modal particle intensifying preceding clause)
我 (wǒ) — I; me; my.
是 (shì) — to be (followed by substantives only). Also: correct; right; true, (respectful acknowledgement of a command) very well, (adverb for emphatic assertion)
你 (nǐ) — you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您).
在 (zài) — to exist; to be alive. Also: (of sb or sth) to be (located) at, (used before a verb to indicate an action in progress)
不 (bù) — no; not so. Also: (bound form) not; un-
有 (yǒu) — to have; there is. Also: (bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 意 intentional)
他 (tā) — he. Also: (used before sb's name for emphasis), (used as a meaningless mock object), (literary) other
这 (zhè) — (pronoun) this; these. Also: (bound form) this; the (followed by a noun), (bound form) this; these (followed by a classifier) (in this sense, commonly pr. [zhèi], esp. in Beijing)

就 (jiù) — (after a suppositional clause) in that case. Also: (after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after, (same as 是) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly, only; as little as, as much as; as many as
个 (gě) — used in 自个儿.
人 (rén) — person; people.
说 (shuì) — to persuade.
我们 (wǒ men) — we. Also: us, ourselves, our
要 (yāo) — to demand; to coerce.
好 (hǎo) — good. Also: appropriate; proper, all right!, (before a verb) easy to, (before a verb) good to
一 (yī) — one. Also: single, a (article), as soon as, entire; whole; all; throughout
会 (huì) — can; to have the skill. Also: to be likely to; to be sure to, to meet; to get together, meeting; gathering, (suffix) union; group; association
对 (duì) — right; correct. Also: towards; at; for, concerning; regarding, to treat (sb a certain way), to face

到 (dào) — to reach; to arrive. Also: to leave for; to go to, to (a place); until (a time); up to (a point), (verb complement indicating arriving at a place or reaching a point), considerate; thoughtful; thorough
上 (shǎng) — used in 上声.

来 (lái) — to come. Also: (used as a substitute for a more specific verb), hither (directional complement for motion toward the speaker, as in 回来), ever since (as in 自古以来), for the past (amount of time)
很 (hěn) — (adverb of degree). Also: quite, very, awfully
去 (qù) — to go. Also: to go to (a place), (of a time etc) last, just passed, to send
她 (tā) — she.
着 (zhāo) — (chess) move. Also: trick, all right!, (dialect) to add
想 (xiǎng) — to think (about). Also: to think of; to devise, to think (that); to believe (that), to desire; to want (to), to miss (feel wistful about the absence of)
给 (gěi) — to. Also: for, for the benefit of, to give, to allow
没有 (méi yǒu) — haven't. Also: hasn't, doesn't exist, to not have, to not be
他们 (tā men) — they.
看 (kān) — to look after. Also: to take care of, to watch, to guard

做 (zuò) — to make; to produce. Also: to write; to compose, to do; to engage in; to hold (a party etc), (of a person) to be (an intermediary, a good student etc); to become (husband and wife, friends etc), (of a thing) to serve as; to be used for
什么 (shén me) — what?. Also: something, anything
吧 (bā) — bar (loanword). Also: to puff (on a pipe etc), (onom.) bang, abbr. for 贴吧
点 (diǎn) — point. Also: dot, drop, speck, o'clock
没 (méi) — (negative prefix for verbs) have not.
大 (dà) — big; large; great. Also: older (than another person), eldest (as in 姐), greatly; freely; fully, (dialect) father
下 (xià) — down. Also: downwards, below, lower, later
中 (Zhōng) — China. Also: Chinese, surname Zhong
真 (zhēn) — really. Also: truly, indeed, real, true
现在 (xiàn zài) — now. Also: at present, at the moment, modern, current
用 (yòng) — to use. Also: to employ, to have to, to eat or drink, expense or outlay
多 (duō) — many; much. Also: too many; in excess, (after a numeral) ... odd, how (to what extent) (Taiwan pr. [duó]), (bound form) multi-; poly-
两 (liǎng) — two. Also: both, some, a few, tael, unit of weight equal to 50 grams (modern) or 1⁄16 of a catty 斤 (old)
等 (děng) — class. Also: rank, grade, equal to, same as
吗 (má) — (coll.) what?.
天 (tiān) — day. Also: sky, heaven
出 (chū) — to go out. Also: to come out, to occur, to produce, to go beyond
太 (tài) — highest. Also: greatest, too (much), very, extremely
再 (zài) — again; once more; re-. Also: second; another, then (after sth, and not until then), no matter how ... (followed by an adjective or verb, and then (usually) 也 or 都 for emphasis)

呢 (ne) — particle indicating that a previously asked question is to. Also: particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?"), particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?"), (at the end of a declarative sentence) particle indicating continuation of a state or action, particle indicating strong affirmation
次 (cì) — next in sequence. Also: second, the second (day, time etc), secondary, vice-
小 (xiǎo) — small. Also: tiny, few, young
知道 (zhī dào) — to know. Also: also pr. [zhī dao]
时候 (shí hou) — time. Also: length of time, moment, period
走 (zǒu) — to walk. Also: to go, to run, to move (of vehicle), to visit
工作 (gōng zuò) — to work. Also: (of a machine) to operate, job, work, task
事 (shì) — matter. Also: thing, item, work, affair
家 (jiā) — used in 家伙 and 家俱.
你们 (nǐ men) — you (plural).
前 (qián) — front. Also: forward, ahead, first, top (followed by a number)
时间 (shí jiān) — time. Also: period
怎么 (zěn me) — how?. Also: what?, why?
地 (de) — -ly. Also: structural particle: used before a verb or adjective, linking it to preceding modifying adverbial adjunct
这些 (zhè xiē) — these.
跟 (gēn) — heel. Also: to follow closely, to go with, (of a woman) to marry sb, with
吃 (chī) — to eat; to consume. Also: to eat at (a cafeteria etc), to eradicate; to destroy, to absorb, to suffer (shock, injury, defeat etc)
谁 (shéi) — who. Also: also pr. [shuí]
找 (zhǎo) — to try to find. Also: to look for, to call on sb, to find, to seek
打 (dá) — dozen (loanword).
还有 (hái yǒu) — furthermore. Also: in addition, still, also
快 (kuài) — rapid. Also: quick, speed, rate, soon
比 (Bǐ) — Belgium. Also: Belgian, abbr. for 比利时
今天 (jīn tiān) — today. Also: at the present, now
话 (huà) — dialect. Also: language, spoken words, speech, talk
还是 (hái shi) — still (as before). Also: had better, unexpectedly, or
觉得 (jué de) — to think that .... Also: to feel (uncomfortable etc)
月 (yuè) — moon. Also: month, monthly
看到 (kàn dào) — to see.
起来 (qǐ lai) — to stand up. Also: to get up, also pr. [qǐ lái]
一起 (yī qǐ) — in the same place. Also: together, with, altogether (in total)
起 (qǐ) — to rise. Also: to raise, to get up, to set out, to start
几 (jī) — small table.
见 (jiàn) — to see. Also: to meet, to appear (to be sth), to interview, opinion
一些 (yī xiē) — some. Also: a few, a little, (following an adjective) slightly ...er
找到 (zhǎo dào) — to find.
手 (shǒu) — hand. Also: (formal) to hold, person engaged in certain types of work, person skilled in certain types of work, personal(ly)
听 (yǐn) — smile (archaic).
非常 (fēi cháng) — very; really. Also: unusual; extraordinary

开 (kāi) — to open (transitive or intransitive). Also: (of ships, vehicles, troops etc) to start, to turn on; to put in operation; to operate; to run, to boil, to write out (a prescription, check, invoice etc)
叫 (jiào) — to shout. Also: to call, to order, to ask, to be called
孩子 (hái zi) — child.
请 (qǐng) — to ask. Also: to invite, please (do sth), to treat (to a meal etc), to request
本 (běn) — root. Also: stem, origin, source, this
回 (huí) — to circle. Also: to go back, to turn around, to answer, to return
东西 (dōng xī) — east and west.
一样 (yī yàng) — same. Also: like, equal to, the same as, just like
买 (mǎi) — to buy. Also: to purchase
重要 (zhòng yào) — important. Also: significant, major
问 (wèn) — to ask; to inquire.
告诉 (gào sù) — to press charges.
出来 (chū lái) — to come out. Also: to appear, to arise
地方 (dì fāng) — region. Also: regional (away from the central administration), local
最后 (zuì hòu) — final. Also: last, finally, ultimate
老 (lǎo) — prefix used before the surname of a person or a numeral. Also: old (of people), venerable (person), experienced, of long standing
岁 (suì) — years old. Also: years old
行 (háng) — row. Also: line, commercial firm, line of business, profession
号 (háo) — roar. Also: cry
放 (fàng) — to put. Also: to place, to release, to free, to let go
朋友 (péng you) — friend.
住 (zhù) — to live. Also: to dwell, to stay, to reside, to stop
正 (zhēng) — first month of the lunar year.
先 (xiān) — early. Also: prior, former, in advance, first
得到 (dé dào) — to get. Also: to obtain, to receive
那些 (nà xiē) — those.
准备 (zhǔn bèi) — preparation. Also: to prepare, to intend, to be about to, reserve (fund)
进 (jìn) — to go forward. Also: to advance, to go in, to enter, to put in
写 (xiě) — to write.
国家 (guó jiā) — country; nation; state.
您 (nín) — you (courteous, as opposed to informal 你).
电话 (diàn huà) — telephone. Also: phone call, phone number
女 (nǚ) — female. Also: woman, daughter
送 (sòng) — to send; to deliver. Also: to give (as a present), to see (sb) off, to accompany; to go along with
分 (fēn) — to divide; to separate. Also: to distribute; to allocate, to distinguish (good and bad), (bound form) branch of (an organization); sub- (as in 局), fraction
女人 (nǚ rén) — woman.
小时 (xiǎo shí) — hour.
有些 (yǒu xiē) — some. Also: somewhat
别人 (bié ren) — other people; others.
站 (zhàn) — station. Also: to stand, to halt, to stop, branch of a company or organization
男人 (nán rén) — a man. Also: a male, men
喝 (hē) — to drink. Also: variant of 嗬
穿 (chuān) — to wear. Also: to put on, to dress, to bore through, to pierce
学校 (xué xiào) — school.
早 (zǎo) — early. Also: morning, Good morning!, long ago, prematurely
们 (men) — plural marker for pronouns.
身上 (shēn shang) — on the body. Also: at hand, among
认识 (rèn shi) — to know. Also: to recognize, to be familiar with, to get acquainted with sb, knowledge
睡 (shuì) — to sleep. Also: to lie down
分钟 (fēn zhōng) — minute.
明天 (míng tiān) — tomorrow.
回来 (huí lai) — to return; to come back.
四 (sì) — four. Also: 4
块 (kuài) — lump; chunk; piece. Also: classifier for pieces of cloth, cake, soap etc, (coll.) classifier for money and currency units
外 (wài) — outside. Also: in addition, foreign, external
晚上 (wǎn shang) — evening. Also: night, in the evening
妈 (mā) — ma. Also: mom, mother
球 (qiú) — ball. Also: sphere, globe, ball game, match
谢谢 (xiè xie) — to thank. Also: thanks, thank you
学 (xué) — to learn. Also: to study, to imitate, science, -ology
多少 (duō shǎo) — number. Also: amount, somewhat
第二 (dì èr) — second. Also: number two, next, secondary
妈妈 (mā ma) — mama. Also: mommy, mother
少 (shǎo) — few. Also: less, to lack, to be missing, to stop (doing sth)
别的 (bié de) — else. Also: other
难 (nán) — difficult (to...). Also: problem, difficulty, difficult, not good
电影 (diàn yǐng) — movie; film.
间 (jiān) — between. Also: among, within a definite time or space, room, section of a room or lateral space between two pairs of pillars
哪 (nǎ) — how. Also: which
跑 (páo) — (of an animal) to paw (the ground).
回家 (huí jiā) — to return home.
昨天 (zuó tiān) — yesterday.
晚 (wǎn) — evening. Also: night, late
五 (wǔ) — five. Also: 5
先生 (xiān sheng) — teacher. Also: gentleman; sir; mister (Mr.), husband, (dialect) doctor
男 (nán) — male. Also: Baron, lowest of five orders of nobility 位
动 (dòng) — (of sth) to move. Also: to set in movement, to displace, to touch, to make use of
医院 (yī yuàn) — hospital.
重 (chóng) — to repeat. Also: repetition, again, re-, classifier: layer
些 (xiē) — classifier indicating a small amount or small number greater than 1: some.
狗 (gǒu) — dog.
真的 (zhēn de) — really, truly, indeed.
子 (zǐ) — son. Also: child, seed, egg, small thing
远 (yuǎn) — far. Also: distant, remote, (intensifier in a comparison) by far, much (lower etc)
口 (kǒu) — mouth. Also: classifier for things with mouths (people, domestic animals, cannons, wells etc), classifier for bites or mouthfuls
学生 (xué sheng) — student. Also: schoolchild
二 (èr) — two. Also: 2, (Beijing dialect) stupid
儿子 (ér zi) — son.
明白 (míng bai) — clear. Also: obvious, unequivocal, to understand, to realize
杯 (bēi) — cup. Also: trophy cup, classifier for certain containers of liquids: glass, cup
记得 (jì de) — to remember.
歌 (gē) — song. Also: to sing
半 (bàn) — half. Also: semi-, incomplete, (after a number) and a half
中国 (Zhōng guó) — China.
身体 (shēn tǐ) — the body. Also: one's health, in person
元 (Yuán) — the Yuan or Mongol dynasty (1279-1368). Also: the Yuan or Mongol dynasty (1279-1368)
哪里 (nǎ lǐ) — where?. Also: somewhere, anywhere, wherever, nowhere (negative answer to question)
那里 (nà li) — there; that place.
电视 (diàn shì) — television; TV.
飞 (fēi) — to fly.
介绍 (jiè shào) — to introduce (sb to sb). Also: to give a presentation, to present (sb for a job etc), introduction
下午 (xià wǔ) — afternoon. Also: p.m.
出去 (chū qù) — to go out.
学习 (xué xí) — to learn. Also: to study
老师 (lǎo shī) — teacher.
六 (liù) — six. Also: 6
唱 (chàng) — to sing. Also: to call loudly, to chant
大学 (Dà xué) — the Great Learning.
病 (bìng) — illness. Also: disease, to fall ill, defect
医生 (yī shēng) — doctor.
名字 (míng zi) — name (of a person or thing).
她们 (tā men) — they. Also: them (for females)
马上 (mǎ shàng) — at once. Also: right away, immediately, on horseback (i.e. by military force)
今年 (jīn nián) — this year.
手机 (shǒu jī) — cell phone. Also: mobile phone
忙 (máng) — busy. Also: hurriedly, to hurry, to rush
十 (shí) — ten. Also: 10
看见 (kàn jiàn) — to see. Also: to catch sight of
听到 (tīng dào) — to hear.
女儿 (nǚ ér) — daughter.
说话 (shuō huà) — to speak. Also: to say, to talk, to gossip, to tell stories
汽车 (qì chē) — car. Also: automobile, bus
爸爸 (bà ba) — (coll.) father; dad.
字 (zì) — letter. Also: symbol, character, word, courtesy or style name traditionally given to males aged 20 in dynastic China
漂亮 (piào liang) — pretty. Also: beautiful
高兴 (gāo xìng) — happy. Also: glad, willing (to do sth), in a cheerful mood
去年 (qù nián) — last year.
热 (rè) — to warm up. Also: to heat up, hot (of weather), heat, fervent
试 (shì) — to test. Also: to try, experiment, examination, test
来到 (lái dào) — to arrive; to come.
睡觉 (shuì jiào) — to go to bed. Also: to sleep
电脑 (diàn nǎo) — computer.
票 (piào) — ticket. Also: ballot, banknote, person held for ransom, amateur performance of Chinese opera
西 (Xī) — the West. Also: abbr. for Spain 牙, Spanish
床 (chuáng) — bed. Also: couch, classifier for beds

第 (dì) — (prefix indicating ordinal number, as in 六 "sixth"). Also: (literary) grades in which successful candidates in the imperial examinations were placed, (old) residence of a high official, (literary) but; however, (literary) only; just
差 (chā) — difference; discrepancy. Also: (math.) difference (amount remaining after a subtraction), (literary) a little; somewhat; slightly
家里 (jiā lǐ) — home.
不用 (bù yòng) — need not.
读 (dòu) — comma. Also: phrase marked by pause
忘 (wàng) — to forget. Also: to overlook, to neglect
认真 (rèn zhēn) — conscientious. Also: earnest, serious, to take seriously, to take to heart
电 (diàn) — lightning. Also: electricity, electric (bound form), to get (or give) an electric shock, phone call or telegram etc
房子 (fáng zi) — house. Also: building (single- or two-story), apartment, room
飞机 (fēi jī) — airplane.
早上 (zǎo shang) — early morning.
回答 (huí dá) — to reply; to answer. Also: reply; answer
记 (jì) — to record. Also: to note, to memorize, to remember, mark
哥 (gē) — elder brother.
爸 (bà) — father. Also: dad, pa, papa
风 (fēng) — wind. Also: news, style, custom, manner
猫 (māo) — cat. Also: (dialect) to hide oneself, (coll.) modem
回去 (huí qu) — to return. Also: to go back
累 (lěi) — to accumulate. Also: to involve or implicate (Taiwan pr. [lèi]), continuous, repeated
打开 (dǎ kāi) — to open. Also: to show (a ticket), to turn on, to switch on
病人 (bìng rén) — sick person. Also: patient, invalid
肉 (ròu) — meat. Also: flesh, pulp (of a fruit), (coll.) (of a fruit) squashy, (of a person) flabby

facts.quizQuestion: What does "打电话" (dǎ diàn huà) mean?
facts.explanation: 打电话 (dǎ diàn huà) — to make a telephone call.
休息 (xiū xi) — rest. Also: to rest
坏 (huài) — bad. Also: spoiled, broken, to break down, (suffix) to the utmost
一边 (yī biān) — one side. Also: either side, on the one hand, on the other hand, doing while
洗 (xǐ) — to wash; to bathe. Also: to develop (photographs), to shuffle (cards etc), to erase (a recording)
后面 (hòu mian) — the back; the rear. Also: behind; near the end; at the back, later; afterwards
有的 (yǒu de) — (there are) some (who are...). Also: some (exist)
喂 (wéi) — hello (when answering the phone).
忘记 (wàng jì) — to forget.
房间 (fáng jiān) — room.
八 (bā) — eight; 8.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "怎么样" (zěn me yàng) mean?
facts.explanation: 怎么样 (zěn me yàng) — how?. Also: how about?, how was it?, how are things?
吃饭 (chī fàn) — to have a meal. Also: to eat, to make a living
动作 (dòng zuò) — movement; motion; action. Also: to act; to move
七 (qī) — seven. Also: 7
菜 (cài) — dish (type of food). Also: vegetable, cuisine, (coll.) (one's) type, (of one's skills etc) weak
衣服 (yī fu) — clothes.
饿 (è) — to be hungry. Also: hungry, to starve (sb)
树 (shù) — tree. Also: to cultivate, to set up
右 (yòu) — right; right-hand side. Also: (bound form) (politics) right of center, (bound form) (old) west, (literary) the right side as the side of precedence
上班 (shàng bān) — to go to work. Also: to be on duty, to start work, to go to the office
生日 (shēng rì) — birthday.
姐姐 (jiě jie) — older sister.
课 (kè) — subject. Also: course, class, lesson, to levy
饭 (fàn) — cooked rice. Also: meal, (loanword) fan, devotee
一半 (yī bàn) — half.
家人 (jiā rén) — family member. Also: (old) servant
有时 (yǒu shí) — sometimes. Also: now and then
小姐 (xiǎo jie) — young lady. Also: miss, (slang) prostitute

facts.quizQuestion: What does "对不起" (duì bu qǐ) mean?
facts.explanation: 对不起 (duì bu qǐ) — I'm sorry; excuse me. Also: to let (sb) down; to disappoint
进去 (jìn qù) — to go in.
哥哥 (gē ge) — older brother.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "没什么" (méi shén me) mean?
facts.explanation: 没什么 (méi shén me) — nothing. Also: it doesn't matter, it's nothing, never mind
路上 (lù shang) — on the road. Also: on a journey, road surface
天气 (tiān qì) — weather.
最好 (zuì hǎo) — best. Also: (you) had better (do what we suggest)
考试 (kǎo shì) — to take an exam. Also: exam

facts.quizQuestion: What does "有时候" (yǒu shí hou) mean?
facts.explanation: 有时候 (yǒu shí hou) — sometimes.
慢 (màn) — slow.
前面 (qián miàn) — ahead. Also: in front, preceding, above, also pr. [qián mian]
旁边 (páng biān) — side; adjacent place.
同学 (tóng xué) — to study at the same school. Also: fellow student, classmate
北 (běi) — north. Also: (classical) to be defeated
帮忙 (bāng máng) — to help. Also: to lend a hand, to do a favor, to do a good turn
见面 (jiàn miàn) — to meet.
好看 (hǎo kàn) — good-looking. Also: nice-looking, good (of a movie, book, TV show etc), embarrassed, humiliated
中间 (zhōng jiān) — the middle; the inside. Also: in the middle; within; between; among, during; in the meantime
女生 (nǚ shēng) — schoolgirl. Also: female student, girl
茶 (chá) — tea. Also: tea plant
地点 (dì diǎn) — place. Also: site, location, venue
雨 (yǔ) — rain.
星期 (xīng qī) — week. Also: day of the week, Sunday
车上 (chē shàng) — Car.
考 (kǎo) — to beat. Also: to hit, variant of 考, to inspect, to test
九 (jiǔ) — nine. Also: 9
妹妹 (mèi mei) — younger sister. Also: young woman
生气 (shēng qì) — to get angry. Also: to take offense, angry, vitality, liveliness
地上 (dì shang) — on the ground. Also: on the floor
上午 (shàng wǔ) — morning.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "一会儿" (yī huì r) mean?
facts.explanation: 一会儿 (yī huì r) — a moment. Also: a while, in a moment, now...now..., also pr. [yī huǐ r]
贵 (guì) — expensive. Also: noble, precious, (honorific) your
记住 (jì zhu) — to remember. Also: to bear in mind, to learn by heart
下次 (xià cì) — next time.
知识 (zhī shi) — knowledge. Also: intellectual
机场 (jī chǎng) — airport; airfield. Also: (slang) service provider for Shadowsocks or similar software for circumventing Internet censorship
学院 (xué yuàn) — college. Also: educational institute, school, faculty
老人 (lǎo rén) — old man or woman. Also: the elderly, one's aged parents or grandparents
页 (xié) — head.
工人 (gōng rén) — worker.
那边 (nà bian) — over there. Also: yonder
弟弟 (dì di) — younger brother.
干净 (gān jìng) — clean. Also: neat
在家 (zài jiā) — to be at home. Also: (at a workplace) to be in (as opposed to being away on official business 差), (Buddhism etc) to remain a layman (as opposed to becoming a monk or a nun 家)
网上 (wǎng shàng) — online.
好吃 (hǎo chī) — tasty. Also: delicious
明年 (míng nián) — next year.
再见 (zài jiàn) — goodbye. Also: see you again later
